color.name: Color Challenges
color.description: Rune and item themed challenges based on color combinations

bonus.name: Bonus Challenges
bonus.description: Special gamemode or unique condition challenges

unique.name: Unique Challenges
unique.description: One-time achievement challenges with special rewards

seasonalChallenges.name: Thresh's Cat Employee
seasonalChallenges.requirement: Harvest at least 1 soul per 3 minutes (0.3/min) with Dark Harvest

seasonalChallenges.name: Cat Creep
seasonalChallenges.requirement: Spot at least 1 enemy per 5 minutes (0.2/min) with Ghost Poro

seasonalChallenges.name: Hallowed Cat
seasonalChallenges.requirement: Complete both Thresh's Cat Employee and Cat Creep challenges in a single game

colorChallenges.name: Red Cat
colorChallenges.requirement: With domination primary tree, get 5 kills with red items

colorChallenges.name: Garfield
colorChallenges.requirement: With red and yellow runes, get 25 kills + assists with orange items

colorChallenges.name: Yellow Cat
colorChallenges.requirement: Yellow items with yellow runes, get at least 1 vision score per minute

colorChallenges.name: Green Cat
colorChallenges.requirement: Green items with green rune, do at least 7,000 healing

colorChallenges.name: Blue Cat
colorChallenges.requirement: Blue items with blue runes, get at least 20 CC score

colorChallenges.name: Purple Cat
colorChallenges.requirement: With blue and red runes, get 5 kills with purple items

bonusChallenges.name: CATaclysm
bonusChallenges.requirement: Get at least 5 Cho'Gath stacks in Ultimate Spellbook

bonusChallenges.name: Yuumi Top Diff
bonusChallenges.requirement: Have more Kills+Assists-Deaths than the enemy top laner

bonusChallenges.name: Jungle Cat
bonusChallenges.requirement: Go jungle and kill at least 2 dragons

bonusChallenges.name: TFT Yuumi Carry
bonusChallenges.requirement: Full build Yuumi, maintain winstreak condition

uniqueChallenges.name: Little Pakiti
uniqueChallenges.requirement: Beat the record of fastest jungle clear in practice tool

uniqueChallenges.name: Bopped 'em All
uniqueChallenges.requirement: Get a Penta Kill as Yuumi

uniqueChallenges.name: Claws Out
uniqueChallenges.requirement: Deal at least 10,000 damage as Full AD Yuumi (not support role)

uniqueChallenges.name: Post Scratched
uniqueChallenges.requirement: Deal at least 5,000 damage to towers

regularChallenges.name: Out on the Prowl
regularChallenges.requirement: Play AP Yuumi and get at least 7 kills

regularChallenges.name: Yuumi Diff
regularChallenges.requirement: Have at least 10 more Kills + Assists - Deaths than the enemy support

regularChallenges.name: Brightest Light
regularChallenges.requirement: Get at least 1.75 vision score per minute

regularChallenges.name: Victorious Yuumi
regularChallenges.requirement: Maintain winstreak of 5 games or higher

regularChallenges.name: Cat Got Your Tongue
regularChallenges.requirement: Have CC Score of 20 or higher

regularChallenges.name: Top Purrcentile
regularChallenges.requirement: Finish all support item's quests before 14 minutes

regularChallenges.name: We Got This
regularChallenges.requirement: Get at least 1.20 Kills+Assists per minute
